enterpriseBaseUrl.name: Nutstore Enterprise
enterpriseBaseUrl.desc: Optional Base URL for Nutstore Enterprise. Leave empty to use the default endpoint. Example: https://dav.jianguoyun.com

errors.invalidFormat: enter a complete server address, for example: https://dav.jianguoyun.com
errors.unsupportedProtocol: the address must start with http:// or https://

useGitStyle.name: Use git-style conflict markers
useGitStyle.desc: Use <<<<<<< and >>>>>>> markers for conflicts instead of HTML tags

backupWarning.name: Backup warning
backupWarning.desc: ⚠️ Note: Sync process will modify or delete local files. Please backup important files before syncing.

conflictStrategy.name: Conflict resolution strategy
conflictStrategy.desc:
Choose how to resolve file conflicts. 
Note: We recommend backing up important files before using auto-merge to prevent data loss.

confirmBeforeSync.name: Confirm before sync
confirmBeforeSync.desc: Show pending tasks and execute after confirmation

confirmBeforeDeleteInAutoSync.name: Confirm before deleting files during auto-sync
confirmBeforeDeleteInAutoSync.desc: Show a confirmation dialog when local files are about to be deleted during auto-sync, allowing you to choose to delete or re-upload them

realtimeSync.name: Real-time sync
realtimeSync.desc: Automatically sync changes as soon as files are modified

syncMode.name: Sync mode
syncMode.desc: Choose between strict or loose sync mode. Loose mode is recommended for users with many files for faster syncing. In loose mode, files with the same name and equal size that have no sync record will be ignored.

syncPolicy.name: Sync policy
syncPolicy.desc: Controls how data is reconciled between your device and the cloud. Overwrite modes delete extra files on the other side — use with care.

modal.title: Confirm sync policy
modal.bidirectionalDesc:
Local and cloud sync in both directions — additions and deletions on either side are applied to the other.
If the same file is edited on both sides, conflicts are resolved by your configured strategy.
modal.localMirrorDesc:
Your local vault is the master. The cloud is fully overwritten to match local.
Files on the cloud that do not exist locally will be deleted.
Best for using the cloud as a backup of your local vault.
modal.remoteMirrorDesc:
The cloud is the master. Your local vault is fully overwritten to match the cloud.
Files stored locally that do not exist on the cloud will be deleted.
Best for read-only devices or keeping multiple devices in lockstep with the cloud.

startupSyncDelay.name: Auto-sync on startup
startupSyncDelay.desc: Set the number of seconds after startup to automatically perform a sync. Set to 0 to disable auto-sync on startup.
startupSyncDelay.exceedsMax: Value exceeds maximum limit of {{max}} seconds (1 day), automatically adjusted

autoSyncInterval.name: Auto-sync interval
autoSyncInterval.desc: Set the interval for automatic background synchronization (in minutes). Set to 0 to disable automatic sync.
autoSyncInterval.exceedsMax: Value exceeds maximum limit of {{max}} minutes (1 day), automatically adjusted

defaultProvider.name: Default provider
defaultProvider.desc: Optional provider selected for new chat sessions

defaultModel.name: Default model
defaultModel.desc: Optional model selected for new chat sessions

nutstoreLlmGateway.name: Nutstore AI (Experimental)
nutstoreLlmGateway.desc: Authorize to use models provided by Nutstore.
nutstoreLlmGateway.pendingDesc: Finish authorization in your browser. Current code: {{code}}

betaModal.title: Feature in Beta
betaModal.message: Nutstore AI is currently in beta and not yet available to all users. If you are not on the beta list, you may not be able to use the feature after authorizing. We are gradually opening access — please check back later.

errors.authorizationExpired: Nutstore AI authorization expired. Start again.
errors.missingClientId: Missing LLM_GATEWAY_CLIENT_ID. Nutstore AI authorization cannot start.
errors.modelsFailed: Failed to fetch Nutstore AI models: {{status}}
errors.emptyModels: Nutstore AI did not return any available models
errors.refreshFailed: Failed to refresh Nutstore AI models

providers.name: Providers
providers.presetModelsRefreshFailed: Update failed. Continuing with local/built-in model list.
providers.presetModelsRefreshFailedWithReason: Update failed. Continuing with local/built-in model list: {{reason}}
providers.updateModelsHint: {{count}} preset model(s) can be added to this provider.

allowBrowserCors.name: Allow browser CORS requests
allowBrowserCors.desc: Prefer native browser fetch for providers that support CORS, enabling streaming output

model.idDesc: Model identifier sent to the API (e.g. gpt-4o)

providers.title: Providers
providers.updateModelsDesc: {{count}} model(s) will be added to {{provider}}. Please confirm the new models below:

provider.corsConfirmMessage: Not every provider allows direct browser cross-origin access. When enabled, the plugin will prefer native browser fetch to support streaming output. If this provider stops working afterward, return here and turn this option off.

yolo.name: Full access
yolo.desc: ⚠️ When enabled, AI can read and write vault files directly without user confirmation

errors.invalidProvidersConfig: AI provider configuration is invalid. Please fix it in settings. Details: {{reason}}
errors.duplicateModelId: A model with this ID already exists
errors.duplicateProviderId: A provider with this name already exists
errors.reservedProviderId: This provider name is reserved by Nutstore AI. Use another name.
errors.providerNotFoundForProtocolOpen: Provider not found. It may have been deleted or renamed: {{providerId}}
errors.browserCorsFallbackToBuiltinTransport: Browser CORS request failed. Temporarily fell back to the built-in request transport.
errors.browserCorsFailedWithDisableLink: Browser CORS request failed. [Open this provider and disable CORS]({{link}}).

logout.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to log out? You will need to log in again to continue syncing.

help.name: How to get WebDAV account and credential?

exclude.name: Exclusion rules
exclude.desc: Files/folders matching these patterns will NOT be synced.

include.name: Inclusion rules
include.desc: Files/folders matching these patterns WILL be synced (if defined).

configDirSync.name: Config directory sync
configDirSync.desc: Control whether {{configDir}} is included in sync.
configDirSync.bookmarksDesc: Only {{configDir}}/bookmarks.json will be synced. Other config files are not affected.
configDirSync.warnSyncs: What syncs: plugin settings (data.json), plugin binaries (main.js), themes, snippets, and all other config files.
configDirSync.warnConflict: Conflict resolution: when both sides have changes, the more recently modified version wins and the other side is overwritten.
configDirSync.warnRisk: Risks: running Obsidian on multiple devices simultaneously increases conflict risk; config changes may require restarting Obsidian to take effect.

skipLargeFiles.name: Skip large files
skipLargeFiles.desc: Files exceeding this size will be skipped during synchronization. If sync issues occur, try lowering this value.
skipLargeFiles.invalidFormat: Invalid file size format. Please use formats like "10MB" or "500KB"
skipLargeFiles.exceedsMaxSize: File size exceeds maximum limit of 500MB

mobileAppDownloadFileChunkSize.name: Mobile download chunk size
mobileAppDownloadFileChunkSize.desc: Chunk size used when downloading files on mobile. Smaller values reduce memory usage; larger values reduce request count.
mobileAppDownloadFileChunkSize.invalidFormat: Invalid chunk size format. Please use formats like "16 MiB" or "512 KiB"
mobileAppDownloadFileChunkSize.belowMinSize: Chunk size cannot be below 64 KiB and was adjusted
mobileAppDownloadFileChunkSize.exceedsMaxSize: Chunk size cannot exceed 64 MiB and was adjusted

log.title: Debug logs
log.name: Console logs
log.desc: View console output and debug information

cache.title: Cache management
cache.clearDesc: Delete local cache data stored on this device only. This action cannot be undone and will require rebuilding the cache before the next sync. Your Nutstore data remains intact.

clearModal.title: Clear cache
clearModal.description: Select which cache types to clear. This action cannot be undone.

syncRecordCache.name: Sync record cache
syncRecordCache.desc: Tracks synchronization status for each file.

blobCache.name: File snapshot cache
blobCache.desc: Stores file snapshots needed for comparing changes during sync.

traverseWebDAVCache.name: File scan cache
traverseWebDAVCache.desc: Stores remote folder structure to enable faster sync by fetching only changes. If you encounter file list anomalies or data inconsistencies after a plugin update, try clearing this cache. After clearing, the next sync will need to re-scan all remote files, which may take a while.

clearModal.nothingSelected: Please select at least one cache type to clear.

cache.gcBlockedBySync: Sync is currently running. Wait for sync to finish before running garbage collection.
cache.gcBlockedByGc: Garbage collection is already running. Please try again later.
cache.generateBlobGarbageName: GC stress test: generate garbage snapshots
cache.generateBlobGarbageDesc: Write {{count}} random file snapshots to blob cache (about {{sizeKiB}} KiB each) for GC testing.

aiPermission.title: AI Permission Request
aiPermission.message: AI is requesting to perform the following file operations:
aiPermission.sessionScopeHint: "Auto-approve this operation" only applies to this chat session and resets after restarting Obsidian.

error.mergeNotSupported: This file type is currently not supported for merging
error.requestsTooFrequent: Requests too frequent, please wait a few minutes and try again
error.accountNotConfigured: Nutstore account not configured. Please configure your account in settings first.
error.ssoTokenInvalid: Login has expired. Please log in again in settings.

sync.requestsTooFrequent: Requests too frequent, plugin will resume sync at {{time}}
sync.blockedBySync: Sync is already running. Please try again later.
sync.stoppingGcForSync: Garbage collection is running. Stopping cleanup and starting sync.
sync.suggestUseClientForManyTasks: Tip: When there are many sync tasks, we recommend using the Nutstore client for better performance and stability. The plugin is more suitable for mobile use!

confirmModal.title: Sync confirmation
confirmModal.message:
⚠️ Please note:

1. Sync operation may modify or delete local files
2. We recommend backing up important files before syncing
3. In case of file conflicts, manual resolution may be required
4. Initial sync will process all files and may take longer, please be patient

Are you sure you want to start syncing?

taskList.title: Sync task list
taskList.instruction: Please review the tasks below. Click "Continue" to execute the selected tasks, or "Cancel" to skip this sync.

deleteConfirm.title: Confirm local file deletion
deleteConfirm.instruction:
⚠️ The following local files will be deleted during auto-sync (because they were deleted remotely).

Check files to delete; unchecked files will be re-uploaded:
deleteConfirm.warningNotice: Local files will be deleted, please confirm

failedTasks.title: Failed sync tasks
failedTasks.instruction: The following tasks failed during sync:

chatbox.title: Chatbox

exportDialog.title: Export session
exportDialog.description: Export to a Markdown file in your vault.

chatbox.repeatedToolCallsStopped: The agent repeated the same tool call with the same arguments {{count}} times in a row and was stopped.

task.emptyResult: Task completed but returned no summary.

placeholders.input: Type a message. Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline

deleteSession.title: Delete Session
deleteSession.message: Delete this session permanently? This action cannot be undone.

deleteMessage.title: Delete Message
deleteMessage.userConfirm: This will delete this message and all following AI responses and tool results. This action cannot be undone.
deleteMessage.assistantConfirm: This will delete this AI response. This action cannot be undone.
deleteMessage.toolConfirm: This will delete this tool result and remove the corresponding tool call from the AI message. This action cannot be undone.
deleteMessage.toolRestoreWarning: After deletion, these file changes can no longer be restored by recalling the message.

regenerate.title: Regenerate
regenerate.message: This will regenerate this AI response in place. The original response will be replaced, and subsequent messages will be preserved. This action cannot be undone.

recall.title: Recall Message
recall.message: This will put the message content back into the input box and recall this message plus all following messages in the current fragment. This action cannot be undone.
recall.onlySecondMessage: This will recall the message without restoring related file changes. This action cannot be undone. Continue?
recall.restoreSecondMessage: This will recall the message and restore related file changes. This action cannot be undone. Continue?

errors.apiKeyRequired: The selected provider is missing an API key
errors.editMatchNotFound: Exact text to replace was not found in the file.
errors.editMatchNotUnique: Exact text to replace must match exactly once in the file.
errors.sessionNotFound: The target session no longer exists
errors.taskDepthExceeded: The task depth limit has been reached
errors.taskSessionUnavailable: The task session or model configuration is no longer available
